description_long: This is a single-propeller, fixed-wing airplane with a digital camouflage pattern covering its entire exterior. The wings are straight and slightly angled, attached at a mid-fuselage position, and the tail features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The propeller is mounted at the nose, indicating a piston engine configuration, and the cockpit is located just behind the propeller, with a dark, enclosed canopy. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retracted or not modeled. The overall form is streamlined, with a robust fuselage and broad wings suitable for stable flight. The surface appears hard and matte, with a pixelated gray camouflage pattern for visual disruption.
description: A camouflaged, single-propeller airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, a conventional tail, and an enclosed cockpit just behind the nose. The surface is hard and matte, covered in a digital gray camouflage pattern.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, propeller at the nose, and the mid-mounted wings with digital camouflage.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, symmetrical wings, and the narrow profile of the fuselage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tail, cockpit, and wing structure with the camouflage pattern.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit located just behind the propeller, likely single-seat with a dark canopy.
